productDisplayName: Inkfruit Women's Secret Diary Dark Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionDark grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the front FittingComfort Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not scrub Dry flat/reverse Warm iron on reverse Fly into the world of fantasy with your secret diary in this dark grey t-shirt from inkfruit. The flying print of books and feathers is sure to carry you away into that lovely, beautiful, dreamy world, while the cotton fabric keeps you dry and fresh through all season. Designed for the stylish you, it's a great wear for casual occasions and weekend getaways with friends. Team this with jeans and casual footwear or lifestyle shoes available in a wide range at myntra, for that uber cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
